title: genista sagittalis subsp. delphinensis
intro: Genista sagittalis subsp. delphinensis, also known as the French broom or Genista delphinensis, is a subspecies of broom shrub native to southern Europe and Mediterranean regions. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and improve liver function. The health benefits of Genista sagittalis subsp. delphinensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and even have anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its flowers and leaves, which can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to reap its medicinal benefits.
